hypothesis: Boundary/confidence-selective PMAD logit KD with confidence_threshold=0.40, confidence_power=1.5, boundary_boost=1.0
reason: Full train peaked at best val/mIoU 0.511646, below clean baseline mean 0.517397 and PMAD w0.15/T4 mean 0.520795. KD mask ratio stayed near 0.998, so the setting was not meaningfully selective.

hypothesis: Frequency-aware top-down decoder fusion with low/high-frequency residual correction inside FPN upsampling
reason: Full train peaked at best val/mIoU 0.516915 at epoch 44, slightly below clean baseline mean 0.517397 and below PMAD w0.15/T4 mean 0.520795. Final val/mIoU dropped to 0.486524, showing late instability.

hypothesis: Correct-and-low-entropy PMAD logit KD with teacher_argmax == label and normalized teacher entropy <= 0.25
reason: Full train peaked at best val/mIoU 0.516597 at epoch 50, slightly below clean baseline mean 0.517397 and below PMAD w0.15/T4 mean 0.520795. The selector was meaningful (final kd_mask_ratio 0.910636, selected teacher acc 1.000000), but did not recover the original PMAD signal.

hypothesis: TGGA c4-only with beta_c4_init=0.02 and aux_weight=0.03, removing the c3 high-resolution TGGA path
reason: Full train peaked at best val/mIoU 0.522849 at epoch 42, which is the strongest orchestration-loop run and slightly above baseline mean + 1 std, but it did not reach the 0.53 goal, remained below the best single clean baseline 0.524425, and dropped to final val/mIoU 0.509320. Reject as a goal-completing method while keeping it as a positive diagnostic signal.

hypothesis: TGGA weak-c3 plus c4 with beta_c3_init=0.01, beta_c3_max=0.05, gate_bias_init=-3.0, and c4 retained from R004
reason: Full train peaked at best val/mIoU 0.518253 at epoch 43, only 0.000856 above clean baseline mean and below baseline mean + 1 std, PMAD w0.15/T4 mean, R004 c4-only, and the 0.53 goal. Final c3 gate still opened strongly (gate_c3_mean 0.293138, gate_c3_std 0.331622), so weak c3 did not rescue the TGGA path.

hypothesis: Repeat PMAD logit-only w=0.15/T=4 as run06 to test high-tail potential and improve stability estimation
reason: Full train retry1 peaked at best val/mIoU 0.527469 at epoch 49 and last val/mIoU 0.526316, above the clean baseline best single and prior PMAD best single, but still below the 0.53 success criterion. Keep as partial positive PMAD evidence, not as a goal-completing method.

hypothesis: Repeat PMAD logit-only w=0.15/T=4 as run07 to test whether the R010 high-tail result is reproducible or reaches 0.53
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.516967 at epoch 43 and last val/mIoU 0.508205. This is below clean baseline mean 0.517397, below prior PMAD w0.15/T4 mean 0.520795, far below R010 0.527469, and below the 0.53 goal. Reject more blind repeats of this PMAD setting.

hypothesis: Replace SimpleFPN with a DFormer/SegFormer-style c2-c4 LMLP decoder head to test whether top-down additive fusion is limiting fused DFormerv2 RGB-D features
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.517981 at epoch 41 and last val/mIoU 0.490231. The best is only 0.000584 above the clean baseline mean, below baseline mean + 1 std, below R004 TGGA c4-only, below R010 PMAD run06_retry1, and below the 0.53 goal. The 0.027750 best-to-last drop argues against repeating this exact decoder unchanged.

hypothesis: Switch NYUDepthV2 RGB loading to the official DFormer BGR branch after label/depth contract alignment
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.529090 at validation epoch 38 and last val/mIoU 0.523078. This is below the R016 corrected baseline best 0.541121 by 0.012031, so the BGR branch is rejected for this local pipeline. Active data loading was restored to the RGB cvtColor path and the failed diff was archived under final daima/feiqi.

hypothesis: Use official DFormerv2-S NYUDepthv2 drop_path_rate=0.25 after label/depth contract alignment
reason: Retry1 full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.526282 at validation epoch 46 and last val/mIoU 0.522893. This is below the R016 corrected baseline best 0.541121 by 0.014839 and below R010 PMAD logit-only 0.527469 by 0.001187, so the dpr025 branch is rejected for this local mid-fusion pipeline. Active model code was restored and the failed diff was archived under final daima/feiqi.

hypothesis: Replace SimpleFPNDecoder with a self-contained c2-c4 LightHam-like decoder after R016 label/depth contract alignment
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.527353 at validation epoch 39 and last val/mIoU 0.501377. This is below the R016 corrected baseline best 0.541121 by 0.013768 and below R020 0.532924 by 0.005571. Audit found the run omitted official BaseDecodeHead Dropout2d(0.1), so reject this no-dropout LightHam-like decoder while allowing one minimal R022 dropout parity fix.

hypothesis: Refresh the geometry-primary DFormerv2 teacher under the corrected R015/R016 label/depth contract before deciding on a corrected PMAD student.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.524498 at validation epoch 43 and last val/mIoU 0.507023. This is below the R016 corrected baseline 0.541121 by 0.016623, below the 0.53 PMAD-teacher gate, and has best-to-last drop 0.017475. Reject corrected PMAD student from this teacher and pivot to a non-KD structure isolation experiment.

hypothesis: Official-style initialization of only GatedFusion and SimpleFPNDecoder can improve local random modules while preserving pretrained encoders.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.507906 at validation epoch 33 and last val/mIoU 0.499770. This is far below R016 0.541121, R025 0.532572, and the 0.53 stage threshold. Reject official-style init of local modules for this pipeline.

hypothesis: Replace all four R016 GatedFusion modules with primary-preserving zero-init residual depth injection.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.536739 at validation epoch 41, but last val/mIoU fell to 0.505286 and best-to-last drop was 0.031453. The peak crosses 0.53 but remains below R016 0.541121 and is unstable, so reject replacing the proven GatedFusion path wholesale. Use the result to motivate a residual-on-top-of-GatedFusion experiment instead.

hypothesis: Preserve R016 GatedFusion and add a zero-initialized residual correction on top at all stages.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.536454 at validation epoch 42 and last val/mIoU 0.529803. The run crosses 0.53 but remains below R016 0.541121 and does not improve over R027 peak 0.536739. Reject continuing all-stage residual-top corrections as the next main path; pivot to SimpleFPN classifier dropout.

hypothesis: Add Dropout2d(0.1) only before the SimpleFPN classifier in a separate corrected-baseline model entry.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.531544 at validation epoch 40 and last val/mIoU 0.525760. The run crosses 0.53 but remains below R016 0.541121, R027 0.536739, R030 0.536454, and R022 0.534332. Reject SimpleFPN classifier dropout; the R022 dropout benefit is decoder-specific and does not transfer to SimpleFPN.

hypothesis: Add near-baseline learnable c1 detail strength to the SimpleFPN p1 lateral contribution.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best and last val/mIoU 0.536603 at validation epoch 50. It crosses 0.53 but remains below R016 0.541121 by 0.004518, and c1 alpha barely moved from 0.998994 to 0.998770. Reject further c1-gate tuning; pivot to SimpleFPN + Ham logit fusion.

hypothesis: Add a small learned OfficialHamDecoder logit residual to the corrected SimpleFPN logits.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.533020 at validation epoch 49 and last val/mIoU 0.528883. The run crosses 0.53 and ham_logit_alpha increases from 0.050669 to 0.090593, but it remains below R016 0.541121, R015 0.537398, R027 0.536739, R032 0.536603, and R030 0.536454. Reject logits-level Ham residual fusion as active mainline; do not tune the scalar alpha further.

hypothesis: Gate-only stop-gradient on the depth projection used by GatedFusion gate computation.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.539322 at validation epoch 40, last val/mIoU 0.518738, and best-to-last drop 0.020584. The run remains below R016 0.541121 and has worse late instability, so reject MASG gate-only depth detach as active mainline and do not perform low-value detach micro-search.

hypothesis: Training-only global gate balance regularizer on GatedFusion gate means.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.529498 at validation epoch 38, last val/mIoU 0.521308, and best-to-last drop 0.008190. The regularizer stayed below 0.53 and below R016 by -0.011623, so reject gate-balance regularization and do not tune lambda.

hypothesis: c3/c4-only zero-initialized bounded low-amplitude depth residual on top of R016 GatedFusion.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.539790 at validation epoch 44, last val/mIoU 0.528882, and best-to-last drop 0.010908. The run remains below R016 0.541121 by -0.001331, so do not promote or continue bounded-residual micro-search.

hypothesis: DGL-style gradient disentanglement with training-only primary/depth aux heads.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.534656 at validation epoch 42, last val/mIoU 0.530153, and best-to-last drop 0.004503. It is stable but below R016 0.541121 by -0.006465, so do not promote or tune aux weight.

hypothesis: DSCF-lite c4-only dynamic sparse cross-modal sampling fusion.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.530810 at validation epoch 38, last val/mIoU 0.530308, and best-to-last drop 0.000502. It remains below R016 0.541121 by -0.010311; do not promote or tune K/offset scale.

hypothesis: HDBFormer/MIIM-inspired c4-only global-local interaction residual.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.534131 at validation epoch 41, last val/mIoU 0.509767, and best-to-last drop 0.024364. It remains below R016 0.541121 by -0.006990 and worsens late instability; do not promote or tune MIIM alpha/channel.

hypothesis: MixPrompt-style c4-only low-rank depth prompt before original GatedFusion.
reason: Full train completed 50 validation epochs with best val/mIoU 0.527946 at validation epoch 37, last val/mIoU 0.524679, and best-to-last drop 0.003267. It is stable but remains below 0.53 and below R016 0.541121 by -0.013175; do not promote or tune prompt rank/down-ratio/c4 scale.
